summaries.summaryText:
This week I worked on:
- WS-1258557: WSO: Internal terms and code details are exposed on job page run history and GUI screens
- WS-1589415: Update fonts, jpeg, svg and png icons, read via URL from resources to avoid CSP issues
- WS-1763980: WSO:SS:Enhancement Request: Add OTS Details also in Defragmentation Steps – View Details Section
- WS-1753248: WSO_SVT_LO_UI:Grid footer Pagination arrow is not working as expected in LO screens
- WS-1529723: WSO_SVT_LO_UI:Grid footer Pagination arrow is not working as expected in LO screens
- WS-1160252: WSO-Reduce screen white space

This week I worked on:
- WS-1773234: WSO -C3p0 update to /opt/c3p0/0.12.0/lib/
- WS-1773950: UT
- WS-1772241: Implement DAO layer changes in wso
- WS-1768851: WSO and GPC merge 26.6.0
- WS-1756748: Artifactory Migration from Espoo2 to On-Prem for Netconf-GPC
- WS-1756746: Artifactory Migration from Espoo2 to On-Prem for WSO
- WS-1698760: Adding Export Button in NHI Tab
- WS-1708772: Adding of Preferance Attributes
- WS-1675306: Operation to include files in JACOCO Report

This week I worked on:
- WS-1764183: SVT - ProtEnh-Nested-SNCP : Test and Automation Strategies & Test Cases - Review : Dev - CP
- WS-1309406: ASON setup or connections support or Fortify issues
- WS-1309416: Training or KT
- WS-1326325: ASON: SQX10 Enhancement
- WS-1406891: Auditing the tables for sna,npr and OTN
- WS-1725865: Ason Support: EPR alarm correlation
- WS-1763687: Miscellaneous efforts tracking
- WS-1376902: Auditing the tables for sna,npr and OTN
- WS-1326328: REST annotation documentation
- WS-1326327: Code coverage
- WS-1326326: Automation of 90% Test Cases
- WS-1309424: REST annotation documentation
- WS-1309423: Code coverage
- WS-1309422: Automation of 90% Test Cases
- WS-1309419: REST annotation documentation

This week I worked on:
- WS-1583192: GX-OLS: NPR Port Sync- wavelength param support
- WS-1589127: GX-OLS: NPR: Optical Mtx management
- WS-1707719: NPR: GX - UCM4 TL management (TL synch/provisioning/deletion)
- WS-1707702: NPR - Gx UTM2 TL management, TL synch/provisioning/deletion
- WS-1693182: GX OPS: TL Name generation for GX NE

This week I worked on:
- WS-1704692: WSO-UI & Server Update code flow and design docs for existing component and refactoring
- WS-1765691: Ason: Add support for Tunnel rate column in SNC screen
- WS-1296784: Persist job details and CLOG information in database which is required for re-initializing cache
- WS-1303622: ODL Netconf Library Upgrade in GPC Connector and WSO
- WS-1304268: Ensure Swagger lists only valid Status Code based on the API definition.
- WS-1305031: Singleton instance of RestTemplate to be used in WSO
- WS-1431308: Error handling improvements
- WS-1431556: WSO | Prediction based CO | Popup error messages don't have required user action(all applicable messages correction required)
- WS-1484088: Clean up and Update NE version (System Preference ,Application properties  & mnc shared util changes)
- WS-1560296: WSO_SVT_Margin_Based_CO: Upload node is showing success in upload topology Jobs-run History Even for Down NE
- WS-1591025: JOBs ENUM fetch mechanism enhancement
- WS-1679924: i18n support for WSO - Phase 2
- WS-1384374: Move all hql/sql to Data Source Configuration file
- WS-1379527: version compatibility validation
- WSTEACAT-6478: Last up transition time not showing in the 360 view

This week I worked on:
- WS-1425367: Java upgrade to 11 in WSO
- WS-1639452: Database connection pooling optimization
- WS-1582091: API response time enhancement
- WS-1721044: Security vulnerability fixes in dependencies
- WS-1684521: Logging framework standardization
- WS-1753482: Performance testing and optimization
- WS-1698914: Code review improvements and documentation
- WS-1765234: Database migration for microservices
